page.title: Account Security
page.description: Manage your bound email and login password to keep the account secure.

email.cardDescription: The new email replaces the current one immediately after verification succeeds.

summary.title: Bound Email
summary.description: Changing the email requires verification on the new address first.

email.hint: The verification code will be sent to the new email address.
email.codeHint: Enter the 6-digit code before submitting the email update.
email.codeSent: Verification code sent to the new email
email.verified: Code verified. You can now submit the update.
email.sameEmail: The new email must be different from the current email
email.verificationRequired: Please verify the new email code before submitting
email.updateFailed: Failed to update the bound email

password.cardDescription: After changing the password, the current account session will be signed out.

summary.title: Login Password
summary.description: Use the current password to update the login credential directly.

password.newPlaceholder: At least 8 characters with letters and numbers
password.newHint: Use at least 8 characters and include both letters and numbers.
password.mismatch: The new passwords do not match

validation.minLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.letter: Password must contain at least one letter
validation.number: Password must contain at least one number

password.changed: Password changed. Please sign in again.

summary.title: Local Password
summary.description: This account currently uses third-party sign-in. Add a local password as a backup.

setup.codeHint: A verification code will be sent to {{email}} before you can set a local password.
setup.verified: Email verified. You can now set the password.
setup.verificationRequired: Please verify the email code first
setup.emailMissing: This account has no bound email, so a local password cannot be set yet
setup.codeSent: Verification code sent to the current email

tips.title: Security Tips
tips.description: Use progressive actions for sensitive updates to reduce accidental edits and submissions.
items: A verification code is sent to the new email before the bound email is replaced.
When an account already has a password, changing it invalidates the current session and old credentials.
For third-party sign-in accounts, adding a local password is recommended as a fallback.
If you spot an unfamiliar device, review it from the sessions management page as well.
